description: §20.8.1 — V1 supports exactly one flat `<outlet>` per shell. Two `<outlet>` elements in the same `<program>` shell fire E-OUTLET-DUPLICATE (on the second, redundant outlet). Nested / multiple outlets (Remix-style layouts) are v1.next.
rationale: §20.8.1: 'More than one `<outlet>` in a shell SHALL be E-OUTLET-DUPLICATE.' The shell owns exactly one swap region in V1.
